Withdraw/redeem         remain available so a paused admin cannot indefinitely lock         depositors out of their assets."},"test_FailedSwap_RebalanceReverts()":{"notice":"When the swap inside _performRebalance reverts, the entire         rebalance transaction must revert so no partial state is written.         After the failed attempt: positionActive must still be false         (position was already burned before the swap), and rebalanceCount         must remain unchanged.         This test guards against the scenario where liquidity is removed         and the position NFT is burned, but the swap to re-balance the         token ratio fails \u2014 the rebalance should not silently leave the         vault with no active position and no funds deployed."},"test_Security_InflationAttackBlocked()":{"notice":"Regression for the ERC-4626 inflation/donation attack.         An attacker who deposits the minimum + donates a large amount         to the strategy must not be able to make subsequent depositors         round to zero returns.excludedArtifacts_: The list of excluded artifact identifiers.

returns.excludedContracts_: The list of excluded contract addresses.

returns.excludedSelectors_: The list of excluded selector configurations.

returns.excludedSenders_: The list of excluded sender addresses.

returns._0: True if any assertion has failed, false otherwise.

returns.targetedArtifactSelectors_: The list of targeted artifact-selector configurations.

returns.targetedArtifacts_: The list of targeted artifact identifiers.

returns.targetedContracts_: The list of targeted contract addresses.

returns.targetedInterfaces_: The list of targeted address-interface configurations.

returns.targetedSelectors_: The list of targeted selector configurations.

returns.targetedSenders_: The list of targeted sender addresses.

failed().notice: Returns true if any test assertion has failed.

targetSenders().notice: Returns sender allowlist configured via `targetSender` (empty means no sender allowlist).

testFuzz_CheckUpkeep_MatchesShouldRebala.notice: Fuzz: Gelato checkUpkeep — must return true only when shouldRebalance is true.

testFuzz_DepositRedeem_NoShareInflation(.notice: Fuzz: share price monotonicity — depositing and immediately         redeeming must return at most the deposited amount (no inflation).

testFuzz_DepositWithMinShares_RevertsWhe.notice: Fuzz: depositWithMinShares must revert when minShares > actual shares.

testFuzz_Deposit_SharesMinted(uint256).notice: Fuzz: any valid deposit amount must mint a non-zero share amount         and totalAssets must increase by at most depositAmount.

testFuzz_TotalAssets_GeSumOfUserAssets(u.notice: Fuzz: totalAssets() invariant — must always be >= sum of all user         convertToAssets() values (no double-counting).

testFuzz_TwoDepositors_ProportionalShare.notice: Fuzz: two independent depositors get proportional shares.         alice:bob deposit ratio must equal alice:bob share ratio within 1%.

test_EdgeCase_Pause_DoesNotBlockWithdraw.notice: Pausing the vault must NOT trap user funds. Withdraw/redeem         remain available so a paused admin cannot indefinitely lock         depositors out of their assets.

test_FailedSwap_RebalanceReverts().notice: When the swap inside _performRebalance reverts, the entire         rebalance transaction must revert so no partial state is written.         After the failed attempt: positionActive must still be false         (position was already burned before the swap), and rebalanceCount         must remain unchanged.         This test guards against the scenario where liquidity is removed         and the position NFT is burned, but the swap to re-balance the         token ratio fails — the rebalance should not silently leave the         vault with no active position and no funds deployed.

test_Security_InflationAttackBlocked().notice: Regression for the ERC-4626 inflation/donation attack.         An attacker who deposits the minimum + donates a large amount         to the strategy must not be able to make subsequent depositors         round to zero shares.
